Title: Email issue for Natalie
Notes:
As discussed over the call, there was an issue with the email account configured on the Mac. Their account had been removed from Pax8, which prevented the user from updating their billing details. So requested her to add their credit card information again, but her colleague updated it already, and the changes were not reflecting in the Admin Portal or the user account.
After gathering the correct details, i requested her the billing information to be updated again. So requested to created a remote session on their machine and found that the billing information was added but not properly updated.
Additionally, the admin mailbox was showing a removal warning, although emails were still working. This issue has now been resolved by removing the account from Outlook and adding it back. Everything is functioning properly now.
